title: Intex Sprinkle Donut Tube
features: Vivid and colorful realistic printing - sprinkle donut inner tube float features a fun donut design and photo real printing.
Indulge in a little sweetness - you can have your dessert, float around and relax on it as well, complete with sugar glaze and rainbow sprinkles.
Made durable - This awesome sprinkle donut pool float is made of 10 ga thick, durable vinyl to keep sweet lovers of all ages afloat!
Repair patch kit included – If it should spring A leak, there is no need for worries. It comes with a repair patch kit included so that the fun goes on.
Inflatable outdoor float - relax your day away by the pool. Designed for 14+ years, approximate deflated size 45 inches/
description: Intex sprinkle donut float water toy - sprinkle donut inner tube float features a fun donut design and photo real printing. Repair patch included. 45 in diameter. - style: tube, dimensions: 45 in. Dia., Color: Multi, PKG qty: 1, Package Type: Box
